name: code_review_revision_tracking
system_prompt: You are a senior code reviewer. Track prior feedback and revisions across turns.

turns.content: Review this PR summary: added retry logic but used recursion without max cap, catches all errors silently, and no tests for timeout path.
Author fixed recursion cap at 3 retries and added timeout tests.
Author still catches broad Exception and logs nothing.
Now provide final approval status and list remaining blockers only.

rubric: Score for memory of resolved vs unresolved issues, consistency, and precise final recommendation without reintroducing fixed issues.
